svg.title: Pure RTL top hierarchy with expanded Snapshot core
svg.desc: Reader-facing reconstruction of two Vivado RTL Elaborated Schematic views. The top panel shows snn_ecg_30min_final_top and the lower panel expands the actual u_snapshot hierarchy.
svg.metadata: Vivado 2020.2 RTL Elaborated Schematic evidence: vivado/pure_rtl/evidence/FIG-RTL-A_top_hierarchy.svg and vivado/pure_rtl/evidence/FIG-RTL-B_snapshot_core_hierarchy.svg; digital fixed commit c6b80de19cdcad5b7e43fe7835588b629d847f75; generated by tools/vivado/generate_publication_rtl_hierarchy_svg.py
